summary: A vertical produced clip shown in tight close-up with large white serif overlay text. One frame shows a pair of hands applying or removing handcuffs at a vehicle door with the word 'TENNESSEE' overlaid. A second, motion-blurred frame shows a seated person in a light shirt being handled, with the words 'ROCKY TOP' overlaid. The footage is close and partly blurred.

script.scene: Close-up of hands working handcuffs at a vehicle door; overlay text 'TENNESSEE'.
A motion-blurred close-up of a seated person in a light shirt being handled; overlay text 'ROCKY TOP'.
